//: Managed-settings snippet to push to an external dev's machine to enable SILENT auto-update of the CrossLoom plugin. Place in the ClaudeCode managed-settings file (Windows: C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-settings.json). MERGE the extraKnownMarketplaces key if the file already holds other managed settings. See docs/AUTO-UPDATE.md.
//source: Use the explicit url + .git form, NOT the github+repo shorthand: the shorthand resolves to an SSH clone on a fresh Windows machine with no GitHub SSH key and dies on 'Host key verification failed' (verified task #249, 2026-07-07). The .git clone URL keeps the marketplace's relative plugin source resolving.
